description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This perfume from Rasasi is for the man who is in the quest of knowledge it is for the powerful men. Product Details Rasasi Confidence is a spray perfume for men which comes in an elegant glass flask Size 100 ml
